## Mappings

### Original Manual Mappings Result (cross-checked with mappings generated by tools)
- [DPP-DPPO.xlsx](./DPP-DPPO.xlsx): final mapping result between DPP ontology and DPPO.
- [DPPO-CEON.xlsx](./DPPO-CEON.xlsx): final mapping result between DPPO and CEON.

### Mappings generated by tools
- [DPP-DPPO-AML.csv](./DPP-DPPO-AML.csv)
- [DPP-DPPO-LogMap.csv](./DPP-DPPO-LogMap.csv)
- [DPPO-CEON-AML.csv](./DPPO-CEON-AML.csv)
- [DPPO-CEON-LogMap.csv](./DPPO-CEON-LogMap.csv)

### Python scripts to convert mappings into ontologies based on [SSSOM](https://mapping-commons.github.io/sssom/) and [Alignment API](https://moex.gitlabpages.inria.fr/alignapi/)
- [SSSOM_Alignment_Ontology_Generator_DPP-DPPO.ipynb](./SSSOM_Alignment_Ontology_Generator_DPP-DPPO.ipynb)
- [SSSOM_Alignment_Ontology_Generator_DPP-DPPO.ipynb](./SSSOM_Alignment_Ontology_Generator_DPP-DPPO.ipynb)

### Final mappings in Turtle syntax with/without SSSOM terminology
- [DPP-DPPO.ttl](./DPP-DPPO.ttl)
- [DPPO-CEON.ttl](./DPPO-CEON.ttl)
- [DPP-DPPO-simplified.ttl](./DPP-DPPO-simplified.ttl)
- [DPPO-CEON-simplified.ttl](./DPPO-CEON-simplified.ttl)

### Final mappings in RDF syntax based on Alignment API
- [DPP-DPPO.rdf](./DPP-DPPO.rdf)
- [DPPO-CEON.rdf](./DPPO-CEON.rdf)

### Documentation for the Mappings
- [http://w3id.org/dpp/alignment](http://w3id.org/dpp/alignment)
- [http://w3id.org/dpp/alignment/dpp-dppo](http://w3id.org/dpp/alignment/dpp-dppo)
- [http://w3id.org/dpp/alignment/dppo-ceon](http://w3id.org/dpp/alignment/dppo-ceon)
